Configuration Description: Configure mobile camera PPG service and wearable sensor adapter to create bpm readings with reading source and timestamp.
Configure manual entry object with bpm value reason entered by and timestamp required fields.
Configure threshold service with low and high bpm limits and alert notification component.
Configure encrypted local database table and trend chart component for heart rate history display.
Configure secure sync API and conflict handling for Android and iOS account readings.
Configure authentication token storage session timeout and owner based record access.
Configure consent screen privacy notice acceptance flag and data retention setting.
Configure PDF and CSV report generator with date range filter and doctor review template.
